calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Richard Palenchar and Benson Lai, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Justin Lai, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Cecilia Zamora.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Possession of the premises located at: 2401 24th Street St., #4, San Francisco, CA. 94110
Learse/Rental Agreement forfeited.
Past-due rent and Damages - $6,119.98
Attorneys' Fees $6,000.00
Costs - $395.00
Total - $12,514.98
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Justin Tin is present on telephone standby.
Attorney Benson C. Lai appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Cecilia Zamora IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of FEB-06-2012 remains on calendar.
